desc: This card cannot be Normal Summoned or Set. This card can only be Special Summoned by removing from play 1 EARTH monster in your Graveyard. Increase the ATK of this monster by 300 points during your opponent's Battle Phase.

name: Bait Doll
desc: Target 1 Set card in the Spell & Trap Card Zone; reveal that target, force its activation if it is a Trap Card, then negate its effect if the activation timing is incorrect, and if you do, destroy it. (If it is not a Trap Card, return it face-down.) When this card resolves, shuffle it into the Deck instead of sending it to the Graveyard.

name: Zombyra the Dark
desc: This card cannot attack your opponent directly. If this card destroys a monster by battle: This card loses 200 ATK.

name: Spiritualism
desc: Return 1 Spell/Trap Card your opponent controls to the hand. This card's activation and effect cannot be negated.

name: Revival Jam
desc: When this card is destroyed by battle and sent to the Graveyard: You can pay 1000 Life Points; Special Summon it in face-up Defense Position during your next turn's Standby Phase.

name: Flying Fish
desc: Three wishes are granted to those fortunate enough to see this monster in flight.

name: Dreamsprite
desc: When attacked by your opponent's monster, select another 1 of your Monster Cards and designate it as the attack's target, then calculate damage.

name: Aqua Spirit
desc: This card cannot be Normal Summoned or Set. This card can only be Special Summoned by removing from play 1 WATER monster in your Graveyard. During each of your opponent's Standby Phases, you can change the battle position of 1 of your opponent's face-up Monster Cards. Once changed, the monster must remain in this position for the rest of the turn.

name: Curse of the Masked Beast
desc: This card is used to Ritual Summon "The Masked Beast". You must also Tribute monsters from your hand or field whose total Levels equal 8 or more.

name: The Portrait's Secret
desc: A portrait cursed by the artist, it is said to bring ill fortune to anyone who owns it.

name: Gadget Soldier
desc: A rust-free machine warrior born to battle.

name: Humanoid Slime
desc: This slime apparently has some human genes in its genetic makeup.

name: Spirit Message "A"
desc: This card can only be placed on the field by the effect of "Destiny Board".

name: The Masked Beast
desc: You can Ritual Summon this card with "Curse of the Masked Beast".

name: Amazoness Archer
desc: You can Tribute 2 monsters; inflict 1200 damage to your opponent.

name: Jam Defender
desc: When an opponent's monster declares an attack on a monster you control: You can target 1 "Revival Jam" you control; switch the attack target to that target.

name: Summoner of Illusions
desc: FLIP: Tribute 1 other monster, and if you do, Special Summon 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, but destroy it during the End Phase of this turn.

name: Grand Tiki Elder
desc: A masked monster that wields the most deadly of curses.

name: Infinite Cards
desc: There is no limit to the number of cards in players' hands.

name: Collected Power
desc: Target 1 face-up monster on the field; equip it with all Equip Cards on the field. If any of those Equip Cards is now equipped to an incorrect target, destroy that Equip Card.

name: Shining Abyss
desc: This monster employs the powers of both Light and Darkness.

name: The Earl of Demise
desc: This gentlemanly creature is extremely wicked, feared by man and fiend alike.

name: The Emperor's Holiday
desc: Negate all Equip Card effects on the field.

name: Lightning Blade
desc: Equip only to a Warrior-Type monster. It gains 800 ATK. All WATER monsters lose 500 ATK.

name: Spirit Message "I"
desc: This card can only be placed on the field by the effect of "Destiny Board".

name: Bazoo the Soul-Eater
desc: Once per turn: You can banish up to 3 monsters from your Graveyard; this card gains 300 ATK for each, until the end of your opponent's turn.

name: Swordsman of Landstar
desc: An amateur with a sword, this fairy warrior relies on its mysterious powers.

name: Fairy Guardian
desc: Tribute this face-up card to return 1 Spell Card sent to your Graveyard by your opponent's card effect during this turn to the bottom of your Deck.

name: Supply
desc: FLIP: Return 2 Fusion-Material monsters that were sent to the Graveyard as a result of a Fusion Summon to your hand.

name: Destruction Punch
desc: If the ATK of an attacking monster your opponent controls is lower than the DEF of the attacked Defense Position monster you control, destroy the attacking monster at the end of the Damage Step. (Damage calculation is applied normally.)

name: Spirit Elimination
desc: When monsters in the Graveyard are removed from play, remove monsters on your side of the field from play as substitutes. This card remains active until the end of the turn that it is activated. The substitutes remain removed from play.

name: Dancing Fairy
desc: As long as this card remains in face-up Defense Position on your side of the field, increase your Life Points by 1000 points during each of your Standby Phases.

name: Crimson Sentry
desc: Tribute this face-up card to return 1 of your monsters destroyed as a result of battle during this turn to the bottom of your Deck.

name: Dragonic Attack
desc: This card can only be used to equip Warrior-Type monsters. The equipped monster is treated as Dragon-Type and increases the ATK and DEF of the equipped monster by 500 points.

name: Humanoid Worm Drake
desc: "Worm Drake" + "Humanoid Slime"

name: Scroll of Bewitchment
desc: Select 1 Attribute. Change the Attribute of the equipped monster to the one you select.

name: Garuda the Wind Spirit
desc: This card cannot be Normal Summoned or Set. This card can only be Special Summoned by removing from play 1 WIND monster in your Graveyard. During your opponent's End Phase, you can select 1 face-up monster your opponent controls, and change its battle position.

name: Mask of Brutality
desc: The equipped monster gains 1000 ATK and loses 1000 DEF. During each of your Standby Phases, pay 1000 LP or destroy this card.

name: The Dark Door
desc: Only 1 monster can attack during each Battle Phase.

name: Chosen One
desc: Select 1 Monster Card and 2 non-Monster Cards from your hand. Your opponent randomly selects 1 card among them. If it is a Monster Card, it is Special Summoned and send the remaining 2 cards to the Graveyard. If not, send all the cards to the Graveyard.

name: Tornado Wall
desc: Activate only while "Umi" is on the field. While "Umi" is face-up on the field, you take no Battle Damage from attacking monsters. Destroy this card when "Umi" leaves the field.

name: Tornado Bird
desc: FLIP: Return 2 Spell or Trap Cards on the field to their owners' hands.

name: Fire Sorcerer
desc: FLIP: Randomly select 2 cards from your hand and remove them from play to inflict 800 points of damage to your opponent's Life Points.

name: The Forgiving Maiden
desc: Tribute this face-up card to return to your hand 1 of your monsters destroyed as a result of battle during this turn.

name: The Gross Ghost of Fled Dreams
desc: This monster feeds on the dreams of an unwary sleeper, dragging the victim into eternal slumber.

name: Lady Assailant of Flames
desc: FLIP: Banish the top 3 cards of your Deck; inflict 800 damage to your opponent.

name: Deal of Phantom
desc: Select 1 face-up monster on the field. Increase the selected monster's ATK by 100 points for each monster in your Graveyard during the turn this card is activated. The number of monsters is applied when this card is activated.

name: Nuvia the Wicked
desc: If this monster is Normal Summoned, destroy this card. If your opponent controls any monster, decrease the ATK of this card by 200 points for each monster on your opponents side of the field.

name: Blind Destruction
desc: Once per turn, during your Standby Phase: Roll a six-sided die. If the result is 1-5, destroy all monsters on the field with the same Level as the number rolled. If it is 6, destroy all Level 6 and higher monsters on the field.

name: Worm Drake
desc: Once this monster wraps itself around a victim, there is no escape.

name: Graverobber's Retribution
desc: During each of your Standby Phases, inflict 100 points of damage to your opponent's Life Points for each of your opponent's monsters that have been removed from play.

name: Spherous Lady
desc: Many have been deceived by the beauty of this vampire.

name: Spirit Message "L"
desc: This card can only be placed on the field by the effect of "Destiny Board".

name: Mask of Weakness
desc: Target 1 attacking monster; that target loses 700 ATK until the end of this turn.

name: Magic Cylinder
desc: When an opponent's monster declares an attack: Target the attacking monster; negate the attack, and if you do, inflict damage to your opponent equal to its ATK.

name: Spirit of Flames
desc: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must first be Special Summoned (from your hand) by banishing 1 FIRE monster from your Graveyard. This card gains 300 ATK during your Battle Phase only.

name: Fusion Gate
desc: While this card is on the field: The turn player can Fusion Summon 1 Fusion Monster from their Extra Deck, by banishing Fusion Materials listed on it from their hand or field.

name: Darklord Marie
desc: Once per turn, during your Standby Phase: You gain 200 LP. This card must be in the Graveyard to activate and to resolve this effect.

name: Spirit Message "N"
desc: This card can only be placed on the field by the effect of "Destiny Board".

name: Mask of Restrict
desc: Neither player can Tribute cards.
